articles.title: Cardano (ADA) Set To Explode: Crypto Analyst Uses Historical Data To Predict 2,300% Surge
articles.description: Many investors have been left dissatisfied with Cardano’s performance this year due to the huge decline in the value of ADA, the native cryptocurrency of the blockchain.
